title: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Outside Temperature Sensor

blocks.text: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Outside Temperature Sensor

The outdoor temperature sensor is a chip-type thermistor-type temperature sensor that utilizes the characteristics of a resistance value that decreases when the temperature is high and increases when the temperature is low.
The auto A/C control unit reads the change in resistance value according to the outside air temperature and performs auto A/C control.
